community.name: Legions Of Chaos
community.description: The Legions of Chaos is a VRChat PCVR Avatar PVP Group, which uses the Avatar PVP system created by GoFluffYaSelf!

community.name: AsherisVT
community.description:
The Asheris VTuber is a group that belongs to the new Irish VTuber called Asheris․

I run the YouTube channel AsherisVT‚ where I focus on tours‚ stories‚ discussions‚ poetry‚ and more․ On my VRChat journey‚ I am accompanied by my pigeon ally‚ who likes to call my head its home․

I hold a diploma in journalism‚ and during my time‚ I spent several years covering video games‚ events‚ interviews‚ community⁄online radio‚ and more․ 

TOURS - The tours will see me explore and talk about VRChat worlds I've discovered or that I think viewers may find interesting․ 

STORIES - The stories I share are based on my experiences in life and as a journalist․ Some potential stories could be about interviews‚ events‚ and review processes‚ amongst others․

DISCUSSIONS - The discussions will primarily focus on VRChat․ Discussions can potentially include new updates‚ new items‚ news‚ and more․ 

POETRY - The poetry I read is my own creations from pen to paper to video․ What I read and write is heavily based on my life experiences․

AND MORE - Sometimes I will talk about things unrelated to any predetermined topics․ This may include videos of me having fun in VRChat or my notorious voice acting․

community.name: Local Police Department
community.description:
Welcome the LPD, one of VRChats oldest and largest roleplaying groups bringing entertainment to public lobbies since 2018. The LPD hosts daily VRChat events where officers are assigned to a squad to create roleplay scenarios in public lobbies, themed around interactions with the public and emergency services. Due to the nature of improv, anything can happen during these events. From drug busts and shootouts, to checking mirror dwelling licenses. 

To join the LPD check out the recruitment channel on our Discord at <color=#7289daff>discord.gg/lpd</color>. There you will find the application form as well as our handbook which is packed with all kinds of important information. Once accepted you will go through cadet training, before jumping into patrolling VRChat as an official LPD officer. When you have some experience under your belt you can take additional training to move up the ranks or specialize into other kinds of roleplay that we offer.

Patrol officers will arrest people and bring them to the LPD station to take their mugshot that then gets posted on our discord server for everyone to see. If they choose to not come quietly we have our swat team, known as SLRT, to help persuade them. Once the suspect has been processed they will be handed over to our Corrections Officers and given a nice new home in the LPD Prison with all the other prisoners. And if anyone gets hurt in the process they can be treated by the LMT at our Hospital. To find out how you can help keep the streets of VRChat safe, join our Discord or follow us on Twitter @LPD_vr.

community.name: Yukio's World Works
community.description: It is my world work because i make maps for VRChat

community.name: The Goats from the Twilight Garden
Bump n' Bash
community.description:
Bump n' Bash is a PvP Party Game world where send your foes flying across soaring skies‚ erupting volcanoes‚ and even deep space with a well-timed punch in this platform fighter meets party gameǃ The more damage you take‚ the higher you're launchedǃ

The world supports up to 64 players on PC, Quest, iOS, and even Desktop! With over 15 stages, 12 unique gamemodes, and unlockable skins via achievements with zero microtransactions, there's no end to the fun! 

So grab your friends and join the bash! And if you join the group, you'll get to experience play sessions with the developers and beta tests for future featuresǃ

アップデート、お知らせ、新コンテンツの先行公開、そして開発者とのテストプレイ！
格闘 × パーティゲームの決定版！一撃必殺のパンチで相手を空の彼方、火山、はたまた宇宙まで吹きとばせ！ダメージを食らうほど、威力も増大！

最大64人同時プレイ、QUEST及びIOS対応、全15ステージ、12種類のプレイモード、アイテム課金なし！

このグループは、アップデート、お知らせ、新コンテンツの先行公開、そして開発者とのテストプレイ！

community.name: The Necron Empire
community.description:

We enjoy a loose culture in our group and encourage a good‚ fun but semi serious attitude․

community.name: Megabuilding 325
community.description:
Do you make anything? Music, painting, textures, 3D, 2D, animations, sculptures, etc ? Do you open for commissions? Do you also roleplay? Do you wish you had a virtual store? Do I have your attention yet? Then you should consider joining MEGABUILDING 325!

M325 is a cyberpunk inspired roleplay group. If you enjoy stuff like Ghost in the Shell, Blade Runner, Apex, Titanfall, Akira, The Finals, Cyberpunk and more, then you'll fit right in! We offer creators of all kinds a place to hold a store (no Unity knowledge needed) and do some roleplay with a map that evolves with the players! 

Not a creator? Not a problem! Just come RP, join the guild, run missions and more! Found something cool in a mission? We'll add it to the map! That's right, what you do truly impacts the map here at M325.  Lobbies are every Tuesdays at 7:30 pm eastern. We are also Quest tolerant (Questies be warned, we do not impose players to have Quest avatars. Use your imagination, buddy.)

community.name: Honey's Cozy Cottage
community.description: Welcome to the Cozy Cottageǃǃǃ HoneyHoTkiss is a Honey⁄Teddy Bear VTuber that goes on adventures with her bee buddy‚ Drizzleǃǃǃ She has been a content creator for 3+ years of experience. Started out small on Twitch, followed by YouTube 1-2 years later. She is also representing Wave 2 of Okimi Cafe since October 2022. You may also know her as a Werehog Simp in certain streams from time to time. If you wanted to see some comfy, cozy vibes, along with some chaos into the mix, you're in for a treat!!! I hope you'll enjoy your stayǃǃǃ Stay tuned and stay cozy~ǃǃǃǃ

community.name: 1st Weimar Republic
community.description:
Welcome to the 1st Weimar Republic!

We’re an alternate history VRChat roleplay group based around 1920's Interwar Germany.

We host weekly immersive RP events in the Weimar Republic;
Daily Life of Soldiers
Combat RP
Military Training
Ceremonies

From fighting in the street and countryside against uprisings to simply living out the daily life of a soldier, our events tell an ongoing narrative influenced by all of our members. Want to know more? If Immersive RP, Alt-History or History, and an interesting story appeal to you, then the 1st Weimar Republic is the place for you!

https://discord.gg/ZMP49H3zSY

Join now, become part of our growing community, and leave your mark upon the Republic!

community.name: The Virtual Gauntlet
community.description: The Virtual Gauntlet is a VR game show hosted in VRChat where two teams of four compete in fast-paced, skill-based obstacle course challenges. The show runs in seasons with a strong cyberpunk theme and features unique games like Dodge Wall, Rift Rush, and Grid Lock. We record and stream the matches, promote the teams involved, and offer in-world prizes like trophies and group shoutouts. It's built to spotlight player communities, bring hype energy to VR gaming, and create something exciting for both players and viewers.

community.name: The Blood Ravens

Events are hosted regularly by the week, participating in world hops, PVP matches with other Warhammer communities, Laserdome tournaments, game nights, and more. Our leadership team is friendly and active with a large playerbase and many regulars. We welcome any and all to participate and enjoy the community we've grown.

community.name: No Friends Friends Club
community.description:
The No Friends Friends Club promotes a safe space for people looking to make friends and improve on their social skills.

We host educational lessons about social anxiety, communication, understanding others and yourself. We typically pair lessons with a social activity to encourage you to explore beyond your comfort zone. If this seems interesting to you, we'd love to see you at one of our Friday meetings at 8 PM EST! You can keep up to date with the NFFC at discord.gg/nffc

Check out our booth for more info about the NFFC! Enjoy your time at PJKT fest 2025!

community.name: Failed to Render

community.name: Refraction VR
community.description: Refraction VR is a moderated public VRChat group dedicated to providing a safe and inclusive space for LGBTQ+ individuals and allies. We offer a welcoming community where members can connect, express themselves, and find support within the virtual world of VRChat. Come check out our daily instances and weekly events!

community.name: Study-Japanese【 JapaNichijou ジャパ日常 】
community.description:
Our community is made up of people who have come together with the goal of enjoying learning Japanese.  
We host events twice every weekend, where we explore various ways to practice Japanese, including Japanese lessons, games using Japanese Language, and role-playing events that simulate real-life communication.  
If you're interested in Japanese Language or Japanese culture, feel free to stop by and join us! ありがとう！

Whether you're here to unwind, meet new people, or just be yourself, you’ll always have a place with us. You don’t need wings to feel at home here. Everyone is welcome, and every presence is appreciated. Come join us, and let’s make something special together.

community.name: Tales of Exiles
community.description: Tales of Exile, an immersive, strictly 18+ text-based roleplay server where your choices directly reshape a massive, living universe! Our passion-driven world seamlessly blends anachronistic 1980s technology with high magic and a golden age of piracy, inviting you to hunt for dark relics, overthrow a global shadow government, or forge powerful alliances. Inspired by iconic universes like One Piece, Warhammer, and Star Wars, we offer a unique setting featuring personalized, handcrafted character arcs, homebrewed skill trees, and intricate vehicular mechanics for naval warfare, tank combat, and Age of Sail navigation. Please be advised that our lore does not shy away from heavy, grimdark themes. Including war, complex political intrigue, and deep social divisions. to create a realistic and high-stakes atmosphere. Whether you are a text-RP veteran or a beginner looking for a dedicated, welcoming community, we invite you to step into our world, test your limits, and leave your permanent mark on the history of Tales of Exile!

Paranormal Scene Investigators is a roleplay group focused on the paranormal and unknown. We have weekly events where we delve into the eldritch, the paranormal and the unknown of the VR world

From vampires and cryptids
To Ghosts and Spirits.
To Technological nightmares and cults....
To much much more.

We are our own original universe based on paranormal legends and folktales throughout the world

Some of our events will use D20 to act out some of our roleplay. We are light hearted but most importantly fun!
We are PC and Quest compatible. We lean a bit more towards PC with special effects but try our best to accommodate Quest users.
Come check us out!

community.name: Creative Impressions
community.description:
Creative Impressions is an artistic community aims to bring all of the incredibly talented artists within the VR community together! We aim to create a fun and safe space for artists of all kinds to gather and share their work within our channels and exhibition events, and we hope to inspire anyone and everyone that comes across us.

We offer an array of different artistic channels in our discord server for people to chat and share their works, but we also host a handful of different common events such as R&R and Art studio!
 We plan to host 1 big gallery event a year that will feature many different types of artwork of all different types of media!

community.name: Galactic Clone Army Refuge
community.description: Clone Wars Milsim done right․ A place to leave behind the drama‚ the baggage‚ and all the other issues we're all tired from․ Its time to set down all that weight‚ and find a home in the Refuge․ Rejoice and Fight on!

community.name: Helping Hands
community.description:
Helping Hands is a community that hosts sign language lessons and social events in VRChat.

We host several events weekly, with lessons available for a variety of worldwide sign languages. We also have a number of worlds to explore with interactive functionality that can help you do self-study for the sign language of your choice. You don't need an Index to sign with us! Our teachers show how to sign in VR with both Index and General VR controllers, and with our avatar assets you can extend your signing capability even further.

We sometimes host study clubs where you can sign on webcam with real Deaf people, but if you're shy, we also have Sign Zones and Game Nights where you can practice and get comfortable with your new signing buddies.

You can learn more about us and get access to our events through our Discord:
https://discord.gg/helpinghands

community.name: RWBY Journey Beyond Remnant
community.description:
RWBY JBR is a Canon multi-crossover AU VRC RP that has a wide variety of characters from a variety of different series and franchises that come together in one place.

The focus of the roleplay will be on exploring the different plot points of each season, delving into the perspectives of each character. It's worth noting that certain significant details might undergo alterations, like the demise of a character or a shift in the timeline of events. As seasons unfolds, we'll remain engaged in the otherworldly realm or dimension we find ourselves in. Throughout the replay, the choices you make will shape your character, highlighting both your strengths and weaknesses. Moreover, your decisions will also have a direct impact on the overall narrative of the story

community.name: Waifuwehr
community.description: We are the Waifuwehr! VRChat's oldest still surviving Military RP community founded back in 2017. The community aims to offer a realistic, dynamic, and educational military experience to those belonging to cultures worldwide, all connected under one organization, regardless of one’s personal background.

https://github.com/HoppouAI

With the addition of Monthly Hosted Events which vary from Challenging Games, Fan Meetups or even simple Music Jamming Raves, there's sure to be something to your comfort. As a community founded upon a Jack-of-all-Trades Music Producer, Graphic Designer, Videographer, etc; we welcome your passions with open arms and invite you to share your dreams. So relax, make yourself at home, and welcome to the orbit~

community.description: We are pvp multi purpose community and a social hub for all the people who love 40k, pvp or just want to lay back and a good time.

community.name: Weaboo Weekend
community.description: Weaboo Weekend is a free-to-attend annual music festival celebrating the vibrant worlds of anime, comics, and video games. Our mission is to deliver an unforgettable, immersive experience for fans and enthusiasts alike. Our mission is to an experience that stands apart from anything else on the platform. At the same time, we are dedicated to raising funds for charity. Backed by a passionate and experienced team, along with the support of collaborating communities, we are committed to providing a high-quality event that both entertains and shines a light on charity.

Attracting players since 2017, the Game Show Community of VRChat and its affiliates continue to provide a near-impossible life experience to thousands!

community.name: Anime Ships United
community.description:
The Anime Ships United (ASU) are a group of shipgirl fans come together to enjoy sharing and talking about warships and shipgirls from all fandoms.
We also do weekly game nights along with random RP moments.
Over all we are a chill hangout group for the most part, though if folks want to be more RP engaged we also have the United Shipgirl Navy (USN) which is a more RP focused sub-group and just getting its feet wet, the USN will be doing weekly RP events and has a dedicated tabletop game that the members play weekly.
If you like or love ships or interested in all things boat and shipgirl then come join the navy!

community.name: Wardens of Leefside
community.description:
"Wardens of Leefside is a flintlock fantasy roleplay set in a unique 17th century inspired world, blending swords, sorcery, and the spirit of early modern adventure. Join as a resident of the coastal Town of Leefside - where magic, elemental spirits, and gunpowder all coexist.

We're a community-focused roleplay with a player-driven narrative guided by a dedicated team of full-time GMs

We host sessions every Monday for people of all experience levels with roleplay
Please check our discord.gg/leefside to see when we open for applications! "

community.name: The Strange Pear Gallery of Fine Arts
community.description: A VRChat-based community fine-art gallery that changes the art monthly!

community.name: Kochō no Yakuza
community.description:
We are a roleplay VRChat community themed after the Yakuza game series and Japanese culture in general. We wish to provide, bring together and entertain. 

Providing a friendlier place for VRChat public to roleplay in is one of the aims we wish to achieve, alongside with helping other communities with bigger projects.

Bringing together both new and veteran players who have nowhere else to go, educate people about VRChat as a whole and keeping them up to date on what is going on in this vast but confusing place.

Entertaining both the public and our own people with external and internal roleplay which are still in development. Giving people a place to feel welcomed and a place anybody can feel they belong to.

community.name: El Alba
community.description:
（EN） El Alba is a multicultural VRChat community focused on creating a welcoming, respectful, and non-toxic space for adults 18+. We organize social gatherings, world hopping, themed events, maid café experiences, movie nights, creative projects, community discussions, and collaborations with other VRChat groups. Our goal is to offer a SFW, accessible, and supportive environment where people can connect, grow, and enjoy VRChat at their own pace.

（ES） El Alba es una comunidad multicultural de VRChat enfocada en crear un espacio acogedor, respetuoso y no tóxico para adultos 18+. Organizamos reuniones sociales, world hopping, eventos temáticos, maid café, noches de películas, proyectos creativos, charlas comunitarias y colaboraciones con otros grupos de VRChat. Nuestro objetivo es ofrecer un ambiente SFW, accesible y de apoyo, donde las personas puedan conectar, crecer y disfrutar VRChat a su propio ritmo.

（JP） エル・アルバは、18歳以上の大人向けに、歓迎的で、思いやりがあり、非トキシックな空間を作ることを目指している、多文化のVRChatコミュニティです。交流イベント、ワールドホッピング、テーマイベント、メイドカフェ、映画鑑賞会、創作プロジェクト、コミュニティでの会話、そして他のVRChatグループとのコラボレーションを行っています。私たちは、誰もが自分のペースでつながり、成長し、VRChatを楽しめるような、SFWで参加しやすく、支え合える環境を大切にしています。

community.name: Comrades and Ops
community.description: Comrades And Ops is a gaming and social group which brings people together in the name of fun, good times, and friendship. Our signature event is Thursday Games, a 2-hour gaming session in VRChat held every Thursday at 6pm USA EST. We host and play various games outside of VRChat and encourage participation in major events throughout VRChat and other gaming communities. All members are invited to host their own gaming or social event. Time to rock and roll!

community.name: Aviane Arts
community.description: A group for fans of VR Creations made by VRY!

community.name: 7th Legion
community.description: The 7th Legion of VRChat is an Avatar PvP community that participates in a variety of events (social, combat, rp, so on) within the group, community, and beyond!

community.name: The Bakery
community.description: Demonhead/The Bakery is a group of artists that primarily focus on digital art, 3d animation, and virtual reality environments, primarily based in VRChat. We enjoy creating stories with our art, and giving people something to enjoy!

community.name: Purplexia Host Club
community.description: Purplexia Host Club is a 18+ roleplaying community located in VR Chat. Only rated 18+ for mature conversations that can take place. It is a social based roleplay that welcomes both new comers and veterans to roleplay. Our staff plays hosts, butlers and maids for the establishment. The hosts, butlers, and maids socialize with the guests, serve them drinks or whatever else they may ask for (varies depending on the map we are in), or entertain the guests. We have live performances by some of the hosts or even the guests if they feel comfortable/want to put on a performance for the other guests. We also encourage and help others build up and expand their characters as well as branch out to other roleplaying communities.

community.name: DegenTech Inc
community.description: Group of professional furries working in STEMM fields (Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics, Medical). We hangout in VR and organize on Discord! Check out some of the techiest nerds you'll meet on VRchat!
